Author: GitHub
Description:
Join us for Open Source Friday with Gunnar Morling (Java Champion, Technologist at Confluent, and former lead of the Debezium project) as we explore Hardwood.

Hardwood is a fast, minimal-dependency parser for the Apache Parquet file format. It’s available as a Java library and a command-line tool, with a focus on correctness, parquet-java compatibility, and great performance.

We’ll walk through the repo, talk about the problems Hardwood is solving, and dig into how you can get involved as a contributor.
Title: Open Source Friday with Gunnar Morling with Hardwood
